creator: Tom Walsh
source_text:
Slow Cooker Chicken Taco Bowls

Per Serving (Makes 10)
535 Calories
44g Protein
64g Carbs
10g Fat

Another one from the Slow Cooker Meal Prep Series!

This was added to the digital Slow Cooker Cookbook in late 2025, and is included in all print copies of the book (now available on my site!)

Slow Cooked Taco Chicken 1360g (48oz) boneless, skinless chicken thighs 3 packets taco seasoning 480g (2 cups) red enchilada sauce 340g (2 ⅓ cups) fire-roasted frozen corn 440g (1 can) black beans, drained Salt, to taste

Bone Broth Rice 480g (2 ½ cups) jasmine rice 910g (3 ¾ cups) chicken bone broth

Chipotle Lime Sauce 450g (1 ¾ cups) 0% Greek yogurt 30g (2 Tbsp) lime juice 3 chipotle peppers 25g (1 ½ Tbsp) adobo sauce 30g (1 ½ Tbsp) honey 10g (2 tsp) avocado oil 60ml (¼ cup) milk, or as needed Pinch of salt Chopped cilantro, to taste

To Finish Chopped cilantro, for garnish

Enjoy!

#stealthhealth #slowcooker #slowcookermealprep #highproteinrecipes
notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output; the caption supplies ingredients but no preparation instruction.
Accepted after unlabeled ingredient components were handled by block context.
